author: Foxglove Games
title: Hiring Concept Artist
content:

author: Rudra Singh
title: Looking for Illustrator/Animator
content:
Building something quiet and different with @Soouls_in 🌙
Looking for an illustrator/animator who gets it — mirror-style motion, Lottie animations, predictive UI, social content.
If you (or someone you know) has the eye for this — DM me your best work 🎨 #hiring #illustration
